text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Gee, I sure hope my poster 
is as flashy as this one!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Once I'm more grown-up and shine super—
duper bright, will I get modeling offers?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I better work hard to make sure 
that happens♪
